content:
Fix remaining Nx monorepo build failures. 4/21 projects fail because large libs are not detected as libs (path heuristic misses them) and bundle all node_modules, running forever.

### Problems
1. Lib detection only checks /libs/ path — misses projects with projectType=library in project.json
2. No build timeout — huge bundles run forever
3. Sequential builds — slow for 21 projects
